DECLARATION OF JESSE VALENCIA IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES AS TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210037506) FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PARTIES ARE IMMEDIATELY ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41(A). DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JULY 20, 2023. JUDGE: RICHARD B, ULMER JR., CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Defendant GENERAL MOTORS LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant GENERAL MOTORS LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Off calendar. The parties are immediately ordered to meet and confer in person or by telephone in compliance with CCP 430.41(a). Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by July 20, 2023.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Defendant GENERAL MOTORS LLC's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is Off calendar. The parties are immediately ordered to meet and confer in person or by telephone in compliance with CCP 430.41(a). Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by July 20, 2023.
